**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Changzhou Deliang Vehicle Parts Co., Ltd. is yet another defunct township enterprise suffering from extreme registry misclassification and data corruption. Officially recorded as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer', its forensic footprint tells a completely different story. Recovered historical names (misplaced in the 'industry_medium' field) show it originated in 1992 as 'Wujin Luoyang Stamping Hardware Factory'. Its true business scope, extracted from the 'other_email' field, centers on basic 'metal stamping, metal cold working, and plastic industrial parts processing'. With a micro-capitalization of 588,000 RMB and a corrected 2024 workforce of exactly 1 insured employee, it is impossible for this entity to manufacture vehicles. It is definitively a dormant, 1-person legacy shell of a former grassroots hardware stamping workshop.
